text: A post-hearing brief contained fictitious cases, false transcript citations, false Rule 4 file citations, and references to transcript pages that did not exist. Counsel admitted AI use in connection with the brief.
canonical_source_conflicted: ASBCA precedents, transcript volumes, and Rule 4 appeal file
mitigation_gap: Counsel and staff reviewed the brief but did not verify citations against the actual record or authorities; safeguards were found inadequate.
reliance_or_harm: Board struck the entire reply brief and denied leave to refile.
